title: CFRP Prepreg Out-of-Autoclave Cure Controller
description: Cascade closed-loop cure controller for carbon-fibre prepreg laminate. Outer loop tracks a multi-segment temperature ramp profile via SSR furnace using PID; inner loop maintains vacuum bag pressure; exotherm runaway detection halts ramp; all data logged to serial.
objective: Execute OOA cure profile (ramp→dwell→ramp→dwell→cool) with ±3 °C tracking; maintain vacuum ≥ 0.85 bar throughout; detect exotherm runaway (dT/dt > 5 °C/min) and hold temperature; fault-cut on overtemperature.
constraints: Arduino Mega; 240 V SSR furnace; 0-10 bar transducer; 24 V solenoid; cascaded PID architecture; BOM < $90.
supporting_fact_titles: Carbon Fibre Prepreg Out-of-Autoclave Cure Cycle Optimisation
design_element_titles: Cascaded PID Rate and Attitude Controller
element_usage_notes: Type-K TC reads laminate surface temperature as primary PID process variable
SSR duty cycle controlled by outer PID loop for temperature
Vacuum level monitored every 500 ms; triggers alarm below 0.85 bar absolute
Solenoid modulated by inner pressure loop to maintain bag vacuum setpoint
Cascade architecture: outer ramp profiler → inner temperature PID → SSR, outer vacuum SP → inner pressure bang-bang → solenoid

element_interactions.description: Temperature PID process variable drives SSR duty for outer cure loop
Pressure reading drives bang-bang inner vacuum control loop

element_interactions.from: Cascaded PID Rate and Attitude Controller
element_interactions.description: Outer ramp profile feeds temperature setpoint to inner PID for cascade control
Exotherm runaway detected from TC triggers hold stage before pressure log
